description: Reported throughput is 26.5 million group elements per second across all GPUs; each NVIDIA B200 has 192 GB HBM3e and 19200 CUDA cores. Traversal completed all group elements, validated by checksum 0xc7a9e1bd and confirmed visited count = |SL₂(1021)|. Early termination ruled out by hash-based visited set size and final BFS depth equalling computed graph diameter.
action_taken: Reported throughput is 26.5 million group elements per second across all GPUs; each NVIDIA B200 has 192 GB HBM3e and 19200 CUDA cores.
